## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if possible.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
- AutonomOS version / commit: [e.g. v2.2.0 or commit hash]
- Deployment method: [Docker / Manual]
- LLM Provider: [e.g. OpenRouter, Ollama]

## Logs / Screenshots

```
Paste any relevant logs here
```

## Additional Context

Anything else that might help us understand the issue.
